---
title: "visual"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    toc: false
---
```{r}
library(sf)
library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr)
library(knitr)
library(tidycensus)
library(sf)
library(tigris)
library(scales)
library(patchwork)
library(units)
library(readxl)

```

```{r}

st_layers("HCV.gdb")
```
```{r}
hcv <- st_read(
  "HCV.gdb",
  layer = "Housing_Choice_Vouchers_by_Tract",
  quiet = TRUE
)
hcv

```
```{r}
plot(st_geometry(hcv), col = "grey70", border = NA)

```
```{r fig.width=18, fig.height=10, out.width="100%", dpi=150}
library(ggplot2)
library(scales)

sf::sf_use_s2(FALSE)

hcv<- st_transform(hcv, 4326)
centroids <- st_centroid(hcv)
coords <- st_coordinates(centroids)

hcv <- hcv %>%
  mutate(
    lon = coords[,1],
    lat = coords[,2]
  ) %>%
  filter(
    lon > -125, lon < -66,
    lat > 24,   lat < 50
  ) %>%
  select(-lon, -lat)


```
```{r fig.width=18, fig.height=10, out.width="100%", dpi=300}
library(scales)

ggplot(hcv) +
  geom_sf(
    aes(fill = HCV_PUBLIC),
    color = NA
  ) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(
    option = "plasma",   
    direction = 1,      
    trans = "sqrt",
    labels = comma,
    name = "Public HCV"
  ) +
  coord_sf(expand = FALSE) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    legend.title = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.text  = element_text(size = 10)
  )

```
```{r}

zhvi <- read_csv("Zip_zori_uc_sfrcondomfr_sm_month.csv")

glimpse(zhvi)

```
```{r}

safmr <- read_excel("fy2025_safmrs_revised.xlsx")

glimpse(safmr)

```
```{r}
install.packages("leaflet")

```


```{r}

library(sf)
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(readxl)
library(tigris)
library(leaflet)
library(scales)
library(htmltools)

options(tigris_use_cache = TRUE)


zcta <- zctas(year = 2022) |> 
  st_transform(4326)

# ===============================
# 2. 读取 ZORI（CSV）
# 文件：Zip_zori_uc_sfrcondomfr_sm_month.csv
# 字段：RegionName, 2025-12-31
# ===============================
zori <- read_csv("Zip_zori_uc_sfrcondomfr_sm_month.csv", show_col_types = FALSE) |>
  transmute(
    zip  = sprintf("%05d", as.integer(RegionName)),
    zori = `2025-12-31`
  )


```


```{r}
names(zcta)

```

```{r}
safmr <- read_excel("fy2025_safmrs_revised.xlsx") |>
  transmute(
    zip        = sprintf("%05d", as.integer(`ZIP\nCode`)),
    safmr_2br  = `SAFMR\n2BR`
  )

# ===============================
# 4. Join 两个表到 ZIP 地图
# ===============================
zip_data <- zcta |>
  left_join(zori,  by = c("ZCTA5CE20" = "zip")) |>
  left_join(safmr, by = c("ZCTA5CE20" = "zip"))

# ===============================
# 5. 颜色方案（紫 → 黄）
# ===============================
pal_zori <- colorNumeric(
  palette = "plasma",
  domain  = zip_data$zori,
  na.color = "transparent"
)

pal_safmr <- colorNumeric(
  palette = "plasma",
  domain  = zip_data$safmr_2br,
  na.color = "transparent"
)

# ===============================
# 6. Leaflet 可 zoom 地图
# ===============================
leaflet(zip_data) |>
  addProviderTiles("CartoDB.Positron") |>

  # ---- ZORI 图层 ----
  addPolygons(
    fillColor   = ~pal_zori(zori),
    fillOpacity = 0.75,
    weight      = 0,
    smoothFactor = 0.2,
    label = ~HTML(paste0(
      "<b>ZIP:</b> ", ZCTA5CE20, "<br>",
      "<b>ZORI (2025-12):</b> $", comma(zori)
    )),
    group = "ZORI (Rent Index)"
  ) |>

  # ---- SAFMR 图层 ----
  addPolygons(
    fillColor   = ~pal_safmr(safmr_2br),
    fillOpacity = 0.75,
    weight      = 0,
    smoothFactor = 0.2,
    label = ~HTML(paste0(
      "<b>ZIP:</b> ", ZCTA5CE20, "<br>",
      "<b>SAFMR 2BR:</b> $", comma(safmr_2br)
    )),
    group = "SAFMR (2BR)"
  ) |>

  # ---- 图层切换 ----
  addLayersControl(
    overlayGroups = c("ZORI (Rent Index)", "SAFMR (2BR)"),
    options = layersControlOptions(collapsed = FALSE)
  ) |>

  # ---- 图例 ----
  addLegend(
    pal = pal_zori,
    values = ~zori,
    title = "ZORI (2025-12)",
    labFormat = scales::label_dollar(),
    group = "ZORI (Rent Index)"
  ) |>

  addLegend(
    pal = pal_safmr,
    values = ~safmr_2br,
    title = "SAFMR (2BR, FY2025)",
    labFormat = scales::label_dollar(),
    group = "SAFMR (2BR)"
  )
```
